lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਰਹਹੁ ਸੁਹੇਲਿਆ ਅਗੈ ਨਾਲਿ ਚਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: aithai rahahu suheliaa agai naal chalai |
lines.english: You shall dwell in peace and ease in this world; in the world hereafter, it shall go with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੈ ਸਰੇਵਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀਹੋ ਜਿਸ ਦੈ ਨਾਉ ਪਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: tisai sarevahu praaneeho jis dai naau palai |
lines.english: Serve Him, O mortals, who has the Lord's Name in His lap.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਟ ਲੈਹੁ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੈ ਦੀਨ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਝਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: ott laihu naaraaeinai deen duneea jhalai |
lines.english: Take the Support of the Lord, who gives support in the spiritual and material worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰੁ ਬੰਧਹੁ ਸਚ ਧਰਮ ਕਾ ਗਡਿ ਥੰਮੁ ਅਹਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: ghar bandhahu sach dharam kaa gadd tham ahalai |
lines.english: So build your home of true righteousness, with the unshakable pillars of Dharma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਚਕੁ ਮੰਗੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaachak mangai daan dehi piaariaa |
lines.english: The beggar begs for charity: give to me, O my Beloved!

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਕੜੇ ਚਰਣ ਹਰਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਲੈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak pakarre charan har tis daragah malai |8|
lines.english: Nanak grasps the Lotus Feet of the Lord; he humbly bows in His Court. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਸਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sabad apaar tin sabh kichh saariaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Word of the Shabad is infinite; it has arranged everything perfectly. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੁ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ਮੈ ਨਿਤ ਚਿਤਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: devanahaar daataar mai nit chitaariaa |
lines.english: O Great Giver, O Giving Lord, my consciousness is continually centered on You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਖੁਟਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਮੂਲਿ ਅਤੁਲ ਭੰਡਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: nikhutt na jaaee mool atul bhanddaariaa |
lines.english: The immeasurable warehouses of the Lord can never be emptied out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖ ਊਜਲ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਏਕ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mukh aoojal sadaa sukhee naanak simarat ek |2|
lines.english: Your face shall be radiant, and you shall find a lasting peace, O Nanak, remembering the One Lord in meditation. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਖਹੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਿਆਰਿਹੋ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: sikhahu sabad piaariho janam maran kee ttek |
lines.english: O Sikhs, love the Word of the Shabad; in life and death, it is our only support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕੈ ਪੰਥਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਅਹਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਮਰਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: jam kai panth na paaeeeh fir naahee marane |
lines.english: They are not placed upon the path of Death, and they shall not have to die again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਥੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਵੰਡੀਐ ਸੁਖੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: othai amrit vanddeeai sukheea har karane |
lines.english: There, the Ambrosial Nectar is distributed; the Lord is the Bringer of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਇਆ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਰਸੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਹੀ ਜਰਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: jis no aaeaa prem ras tisai hee jarane |
lines.english: One who comes to savor the Lord's Love experiences it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਣੀ ਉਚਰਹਿ ਸਾਧ ਜਨ ਅਮਿਉ ਚਲਹਿ ਝਰਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: baanee uchareh saadh jan amiau chaleh jharane |
lines.english: The Holy beings chant the Bani of the Word, like nectar flowing from a spring.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਖਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਮਨ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਧਰਣੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: pekh darasan naanak jeeviaa man andar dharane |9|
lines.english: Nanak lives by beholding the Blessed Vision of the Darshan of those who have implanted the Lord's Name within their minds. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਅਰਾਧਿਐ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਆਵੈ ਰਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam araadhiai kaaraj aavai raas |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, worshipping the Naam in adoration, one's affairs come to be resolved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਦੂਖਾ ਕਾ ਹੋਇ ਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur poorai seviai dookhaa kaa hoe naas |
lines.english: Serving the Perfect True Guru, suffering ends.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸੰਕਟ ਛੁਟਹਿ ਅਨਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jis simarat sankatt chhutteh anad mangal bisraam |
lines.english: Remembering Him in meditation, misfortune departs, and one comes to abide in peace and bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਪੀਐ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਬਿਸਰਉ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak japeeai sadaa har nimakh na bisrau naam |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate forever on the Lord - do not forget Him, even for an instant. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਾ ਸਰਣੀ ਜੋ ਪਵੈ ਸੋ ਛੁਟੈ ਬਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: saadhaa saranee jo pavai so chhuttai badhaa |
lines.english: One who seeks the Sanctuary of the Holy is released from bondage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਕਿਆ ਗਣੀ ਜਿਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: tin kee sobhaa kiaa ganee jinee har har ladhaa |
lines.english: How can I estimate the glory of those, who have found the Lord, Har, Har?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਪੜਿ ਬੁਝਿ ਸਮਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur bhettiaa paarabraham har parr bujh samadhaa |
lines.english: One who meets the Guru and the Supreme Lord God, who reads and understands, enters the state of Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀਐ ਜੋਨਿ ਗਰਭਿ ਨ ਦਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavai abinaaseeai jon garabh na dadhaa |
lines.english: One who sings the Glorious Praises of the Imperishable Lord does not burn in the womb of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੋ ਧਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮ ਅਗਧਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak paaeaa so dhanee har agam agadhaa |10|
lines.english: Nanak has obtained that Lord Master, who is inaccessible and unfathomable. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਨ ਕਰਹੀ ਆਪਣਾ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਅਵਤਾ ਲੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam na karahee aapanaa fireh avataa loe |
lines.english: People do not perform their duties, but instead, they wander around aimlessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੈ ਕਉੜਤਣਿ ਸਗਲ ਮਾਹਿ ਜਗਤਿ ਰਹੀ ਲਪਟਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bikhai kaurratan sagal maeh jagat rahee lapattaae |
lines.english: The bitter poison of corruption is everywhere; it clings to the substance of the world.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਇ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਕਿਨੇਹਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naae visaariai sukh kinehaa hoe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, if they forget the Name, how can they ever find peace? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿਆ ਮੀਠਾ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jan veechaariaa meetthaa har kaa naau |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the humble being has realized that the Name of the Lord alone is sweet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਨੀਸਾਣੀ ਸਾਧ ਕੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਭੇਟਤ ਤਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: eih neesaanee saadh kee jis bhettat tareeai |
lines.english: This is the distinguishing sign of the Holy Saint, that by meeting with him, one is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕੰਕਰੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਮਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jamakankar nerr na aavee fir bahurr na mareeai |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not come near him; he never has to die again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਬਿਖੁ ਸੋ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: bhav saagar sansaar bikh so paar utareeai |
lines.english: He crosses over the terrifying, poisonous world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੇ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਨਰਹਰੀਐ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak preetam mil rahe paarabraham narahareeai |11|
lines.english: Nanak remains blended with his Beloved, the Supreme Lord God. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗੁੰਫਹੁ ਮਨਿ ਮਾਲ ਹਰਿ ਸਭ ਮਲੁ ਪਰਹਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gunfahu man maal har sabh mal parahareeai |
lines.english: So weave the garland of the Lord's Glorious Praises into your mind, and all your filth shall be washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਲੑੀ ਅਲ ਪਲਾਲੀਆ ਕੰਮਿ ਨ ਆਵਹਿ ਮਿਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gaalaee al palaaleea kam na aaveh mit |1|
lines.english: Useless talk and babbling is useless, my friend. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਏ ਸੇ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਚਿਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak aae se paravaan hai jin har vutthaa chit |
lines.english: O Nanak, approved is the birth of those, within whose consciousness the Lord abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੀ ਆਇਆ ਪੂਰਨ ਅਗਮ ਬਿਸਮਾਦ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham prabh drisattee aaeaa pooran agam bisamaad |
lines.english: I have come to see the Supreme Lord God, the Perfect, Inaccessible, Wonderful Lord.
